posts.title: Outward Bound to Startup
posts.summary: Outward Bound to Startup: Outdoor experiential learning and starting a new venture might seem like an oblique connection. The reality, though, is that such learning has many important lessons for the aspiring entrepreneur—or the fledgling business owner. They are not often taught in business incubators or at business school, but more is the pity, especially […] The post Outward Bound to Startup appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
tags: What It Takes To Start and Manage a New Venture
